## ⚔️ Strategos Pull Request Template

### Description
Please provide a brief summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. If you are adding a new strategy, describe the logic and any Game Theory concepts it implements.

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🤖 New Strategy / Bot
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX Enhancement
- [ ] 🚀 Performance Optimization
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update

### 🛠️ Mandatory Quality Assurance (QA)
- [ ] **Local Testing**: I have ran the simulation locally and my changes do not break the core engine.
- [ ] **IStrategy Compliance**: (If applicable) My new bot strictly follows the `IStrategy` interface and is registered in `Registry.ts`.
- [ ] **Linter Passage**: I have run `npm run lint` and there are no linting or TypeScript errors.
- [ ] **MIT License Agreement**: I agree that my contribution will be licensed under the repository's MIT License.

### Screenshots / Recordings (Optional)
If your PR involves UI changes, please provide visual evidence here.
